title: Intensely Citrusy Dutch Pineapple Skillet
description: A kid-friendly Dutch dish featuring pineapple, cooked in a ttukbaegi earthenware pot, with a citrusy and chewy texture, and sugar-free friendly options.
instructions: Preheat the ttukbaegi earthenware pot over medium heat.
Add coconut oil and let it melt completely.
Add pineapple chunks and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add orange juice, lemon zest, and vanilla extract, and stir well.
In a separate bowl, whisk eggs and set aside.
Add almond flour and salt to the egg mixture and stir until combined.
Pour the egg mixture over the pineapple mixture in the pot.
Cook for an additional 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the eggs are set.
Remove from heat and let it cool for a few minutes.
